emails.subject: Contacting Iris Mack
emails.body: Contacting Iris Mack Vince, Iris Mack finally returned my call. Her message said she had been in California on a job interview and it looks like she may take the position. I will contact her to get the details and confirm if she is off the market. Toni Graham Staffing Consultant Forwarded by Toni Graham/Corp/Enron on 07/06/2000 09:28 PM Enron North America Corp. From: Teresa Bien 06/22/2000 01:51 PM
